title: aspris capillaris
intro: Aspris capillaris, also known as False Unicorn Root or Asparagus, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, helping to relieve respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems. The health benefits of Aspris capillaris include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve fertility, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aspris capillaris can be found in teas, tinctures, capsules, and dried root forms, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
